option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>org.example</groupId> <artifactId>JavaPiMed</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <junit.jupiter.version>5.10.2</junit.jupiter.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId> <version>8.0.33</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-fxml</artifactId> <version>20.0.2</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-controls</artifactId> <version>20.0.2</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-swing</artifactId> <version>20.0.2</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.pdfbox</groupId> <artifactId>pdfbox</artifactId> <version>2.0.31</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.librepdf</groupId> <artifactId>openpdf</artifactId> <version>1.3.39</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId> <version>5.10.1</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <!-- BCrypt for password hashing/verification --> <dependency> <groupId>org.mindrot</groupId> <artifactId>jbcrypt</artifactId> <version>0.4</version> </dependency>
<!-- JSON processing --> <dependency> <groupId>com.google.code.gson</groupId> <artifactId>gson</artifactId> <version>2.10.1</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.github.librepdf</groupId> <artifactId>openpdf</artifactId> <version>1.3.39</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.itextpdf</groupId> <artifactId>itextpdf</artifactId> <version>5.5.13.3</version> </dependency>
<!-- Webcam capture (real camera access) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.sarxos</groupId> <artifactId>webcam-capture</artifactId> <version>0.3.12</version> </dependency>
<!-- JavaMail for email sending --> <dependency> <groupId>com.sun.mail</groupId> <artifactId>javax.mail</artifactId> <version>1.6.2</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.sun.activation</groupId> <artifactId>javax.activation</artifactId> <version>1.2.0</version> </dependency>
<!-- Apache POI for DOCX extraction --> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.poi</groupId> <artifactId>poi-ooxml</artifactId> <version>5.2.5</version> </dependency>
</dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.2.5</version> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>org.example</groupId> <artifactId>JavaPiMed</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <junit.jupiter.version>5.10.2</junit.jupiter.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId> <version>8.0.33</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-fxml</artifactId> <version>20.0.2</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-controls</artifactId> <version>20.0.2</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.openjfx</groupId> <artifactId>javafx-swing</artifactId> <version>20.0.2</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.pdfbox</groupId> <artifactId>pdfbox</artifactId> <version>2.0.31</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.librepdf</groupId> <artifactId>openpdf</artifactId> <version>1.3.39</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId> <version>5.10.1</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <!-- BCrypt for password hashing/verification --> <dependency> <groupId>org.mindrot</groupId> <artifactId>jbcrypt</artifactId> <version>0.4</version> </dependency>
<!-- JSON processing --> <dependency> <groupId>com.google.code.gson</groupId> <artifactId>gson</artifactId> <version>2.10.1</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.github.librepdf</groupId> <artifactId>openpdf</artifactId> <version>1.3.39</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.itextpdf</groupId> <artifactId>itextpdf</artifactId> <version>5.5.13.3</version> </dependency>
<!-- Webcam capture (real camera access) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.sarxos</groupId> <artifactId>webcam-capture</artifactId> <version>0.3.12</version> </dependency>
<!-- JavaMail for email sending --> <dependency> <groupId>com.sun.mail</groupId> <artifactId>javax.mail</artifactId> <version>1.6.2</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.sun.activation</groupId> <artifactId>javax.activation</artifactId> <version>1.2.0</version> </dependency>
<!-- Apache POI for DOCX extraction --> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.poi</groupId> <artifactId>poi-ooxml</artifactId> <version>5.2.5</version> </dependency>
<!-- ZXing QR code generation (for TOTP setup) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId> <artifactId>core</artifactId> <version>3.5.3</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId> <artifactId>javase</artifactId> <version>3.5.3</version> </dependency>
</dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.2.5</version> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.DatePicker?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Tooltip?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" prefWidth="1400.0" prefHeight="820.0" stylesheets="@../CSS/booking.css" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.NavigationController" styleClass="root-pane">
<!-- LEFT SIDEBAR --> <left> <fx:include source="Sidebar.fxml"/> </left>
<!-- MAIN BODY --> <center> <ScrollPane pannable="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" styleClass="main-scroll">
<content> <VBox spacing="24" styleClass="main-area"> <padding> <Insets top="26" right="28" bottom="26" left="28"/> </padding>
<!-- HEADER --> <VBox spacing="6" styleClass="page-header"> <Label text="Compte" styleClass="page-title"/> <Label text="Choose the date, the booking mode and the reason. Confirm your appointment in a clean and modern workflow." wrapText="true" styleClass="page-subtitle"/> </VBox>
<!-- Carte profil --> <StackPane alignment="TOP_CENTER"> <children> <VBox spacing="18.0" maxWidth="980.0" styleClass="profile-card,modern-profile-card"> <padding> <Insets top="26" right="28" bottom="24" left="28"/> </padding>
<VBox spacing="5" styleClass="profile-head-block"> <Label text="Modifier Mon Profil" styleClass="profile-card-title"/> <Label text="Mettez a jour vos informations personnelles. Les champs proteges sont visibles mais non modifiables." styleClass="profile-card-subtitle" wrapText="true"/> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="16.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="profile-avatar-row"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="108" prefHeight="108" styleClass="profile-avatar-shell"> <children> <ImageView fx:id="profileImageView" fitWidth="94" fitHeight="94" preserveRatio="true"/> <Label fx:id="profileInitialsLabel" text="MF" styleClass="profile-initials"/> <Button text="" onAction="#handleChooseProfilePhoto" styleClass="avatar-mini-btn" StackPane.alignment="BOTTOM_RIGHT"/> </children> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="6.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Button text="Changer la photo" onAction="#handleChooseProfilePhoto" styleClass="profile-secondary-btn"/> <Label text="Formats conseilles : JPG/PNG. Une photo carree est ideale." wrapText="true" styleClass="profile-help-text"/> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="18.0" alignment="TOP_CENTER"> <children> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Prenom" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileFirstNameField" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-text-field"/> <Label fx:id="profileFirstNameErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/>
<Label text="Telephone" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profilePhoneField" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-text-field"/> <Label fx:id="profilePhoneErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/>
<Label text="CIN" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileCinField" prefHeight="40" editable="false" styleClass="modern-text-field,readonly-field"> <tooltip> <Tooltip text="Vous ne pouvez pas modifier ce champ."/> </tooltip> </TextField> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Nom" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileLastNameField" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-text-field"/> <Label fx:id="profileLastNameErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/>
<Label text="Adresse *" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileAddressField" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-text-field"/> <Label fx:id="profileAddressErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/>
<Label text="Date naissance" styleClass="field-label"/> <DatePicker fx:id="profileBirthDatePicker" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-date-picker"/> <Label fx:id="profileBirthDateErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Email utilisateur" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileEmailField" prefHeight="40" editable="false" styleClass="modern-text-field,readonly-field"> <tooltip> <Tooltip text="Vous ne pouvez pas modifier ce champ."/> </tooltip> </TextField> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="profile-footer-row"> <children> <Label fx:id="profileMessageLabel" text="" styleClass="profile-feedback-label"/> <HBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Annuler" onAction="#handleProfileCancel" styleClass="profile-secondary-btn"/> <Button text="Enregistrer" onAction="#handleProfileSave" styleClass="profile-primary-btn"/> </children> </HBox> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>
</VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center>
</BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.DatePicker?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Tooltip?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" prefWidth="1400.0" prefHeight="820.0" stylesheets="@../CSS/booking.css" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.NavigationController" styleClass="root-pane">
<!-- LEFT SIDEBAR --> <left> <fx:include source="Sidebar.fxml"/> </left>
<!-- MAIN BODY --> <center> <ScrollPane pannable="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED" styleClass="main-scroll">
<content> <VBox spacing="24" styleClass="main-area"> <padding> <Insets top="26" right="28" bottom="26" left="28"/> </padding>
<!-- HEADER --> <VBox spacing="6" styleClass="page-header"> <Label text="Compte" styleClass="page-title"/> <Label text="Choose the date, the booking mode and the reason. Confirm your appointment in a clean and modern workflow." wrapText="true" styleClass="page-subtitle"/> </VBox>
<!-- Carte profil --> <StackPane alignment="TOP_CENTER"> <children> <VBox spacing="18.0" maxWidth="980.0" styleClass="profile-card,modern-profile-card"> <padding> <Insets top="26" right="28" bottom="24" left="28"/> </padding>
<VBox spacing="5" styleClass="profile-head-block"> <Label text="Modifier Mon Profil" styleClass="profile-card-title"/> <Label text="Mettez a jour vos informations personnelles. Les champs proteges sont visibles mais non modifiables." styleClass="profile-card-subtitle" wrapText="true"/> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="16.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="profile-avatar-row"> <children> <StackPane prefWidth="108" prefHeight="108" styleClass="profile-avatar-shell"> <children> <ImageView fx:id="profileImageView" fitWidth="94" fitHeight="94" preserveRatio="true"/> <Label fx:id="profileInitialsLabel" text="MF" styleClass="profile-initials"/> <Button text="" onAction="#handleChooseProfilePhoto" styleClass="avatar-mini-btn" StackPane.alignment="BOTTOM_RIGHT"/> </children> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="6.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Button text="Changer la photo" onAction="#handleChooseProfilePhoto" styleClass="profile-secondary-btn"/> <Label text="Formats conseilles : JPG/PNG. Une photo carree est ideale." wrapText="true" styleClass="profile-help-text"/> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="18.0" alignment="TOP_CENTER"> <children> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Prenom" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileFirstNameField" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-text-field"/> <Label fx:id="profileFirstNameErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/>
<Label text="Telephone" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profilePhoneField" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-text-field"/> <Label fx:id="profilePhoneErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/>
<Label text="CIN" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileCinField" prefHeight="40" editable="false" styleClass="modern-text-field,readonly-field"> <tooltip> <Tooltip text="Vous ne pouvez pas modifier ce champ."/> </tooltip> </TextField> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Nom" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileLastNameField" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-text-field"/> <Label fx:id="profileLastNameErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/>
<Label text="Adresse *" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileAddressField" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-text-field"/> <Label fx:id="profileAddressErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/>
<Label text="Date naissance" styleClass="field-label"/> <DatePicker fx:id="profileBirthDatePicker" prefHeight="40" styleClass="modern-date-picker"/> <Label fx:id="profileBirthDateErrorLabel" text="" styleClass="field-error" visible="false" managed="false" wrapText="true"/> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Email utilisateur" styleClass="field-label"/> <TextField fx:id="profileEmailField" prefHeight="40" editable="false" styleClass="modern-text-field,readonly-field"> <tooltip> <Tooltip text="Vous ne pouvez pas modifier ce champ."/> </tooltip> </TextField> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="profile-footer-row"> <children> <Label fx:id="profileMessageLabel" text="" styleClass="profile-feedback-label"/> <HBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Annuler" onAction="#handleProfileCancel" styleClass="profile-secondary-btn"/> <Button text="Enregistrer" onAction="#handleProfileSave" styleClass="profile-primary-btn"/> </children> </HBox> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>
<!-- CARTE SECURITE 2FA (TOTP) --> <StackPane alignment="TOP_CENTER"> <children> <VBox spacing="14.0" maxWidth="980.0" styleClass="profile-card,modern-profile-card"> <padding> <Insets top="22" right="28" bottom="22" left="28"/> </padding> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text=" Authentification a deux facteurs (2FA)" styleClass="profile-card-title"/> <Label text="Ajoutez une couche de securite supplementaire a votre compte. Seuls les admins et le staff peuvent activer le TOTP." styleClass="profile-card-subtitle" wrapText="true"/> </VBox> <HBox spacing="14" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label fx:id="totpStatusLabel" text="⚪ Statut : chargement..." styleClass="profile-feedback-label"/> <HBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button fx:id="totpToggleButton" text="Configurer le TOTP" onAction="#handleSetupTotp" styleClass="profile-secondary-btn"/> </HBox> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>
</VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center>
</BorderPane>
